name: Fire Billboard
summary: A Cesium billboard fire-point overlay that accepts user-provided WGS84 longitude/latitude points and GIF assets, then decodes GIFs into animated billboard frames when the browser supports it.
useCases: FireHotspot 实时火点和预警火点标注
卫星火情、热异常、告警事件点位动画
需要用户为不同点位传入不同 GIF 图标的 Cesium 点图层

points.description: User-provided fire points. Each item must include WGS84 longitude, latitude, and gif URL or data URL; optional fields are id, height, and label.

scale.description: Billboard scale multiplier. The GIF keeps its original pixel size; use scale to enlarge or reduce the rendered billboard.

frameIntervalMs.description: Playback interval after the GIF has been decoded into billboard frame images.

clampToGround.description: Clamp fire billboards to terrain or keep explicit point height.

minimal.code:
import { createFireBillboardEffect } from '@ztgkzhaohao/geo-effect-kit'

const fireBillboard = createFireBillboardEffect(viewer, {
  points: [
    { longitude: 116.322, latitude: 39.968, gif: '/fire-red-billboard.gif' },
    { longitude: 116.372, latitude: 39.932, gif: '/fire-orange-billboard.gif' },
    { longitude: 116.431, latitude: 39.974, gif: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/c/c1/Torche.gif' },
    { longitude: 116.486, latitude: 39.908, gif: '/fire-green-billboard.gif' },
  ],
  scale: 1,
  frameIntervalMs: 72,
})

fireBillboard.flyTo()
fireBillboard.destroy()

notes: The SDK does not provide a default fire asset; callers pass every point and GIF explicitly.
Billboards keep the original GIF dimensions. Use scale when a business page needs a larger or smaller rendered marker.
GIFs are shown immediately as the billboard image and are decoded into frame data URLs when fetch, document, and canvas APIs are available.
Decoded frame lists are cached by GIF URL, so many points can reuse one GIF without repeated parsing.
Call destroy() during route cleanup to remove the data source and clear the frame timer.
